1.11a: Address: Halifax plc, PO Box 548, Leeds, LS1 1WU
1.11b: Standard document issues use same contact as 1.11a
1.14: Firms may not act if the person dealing or their immediate family is the seller.
Firms may act only if a separate fee earner of no less standing or a partner acts for the lender.
1.15: Firms may not act if the person dealing or their immediate family is the borrower.
Firms may act only if a separate fee earner of no less standing or a partner acts for the lender.
3.1.3: Notification of seller's solicitor details is only required if specifically requested.
3.1.5: Acceptable List A ID: Employer's identity card with photo and signature (known employer).

Acceptable List B ID: Employer's identity card (unknown employer), old style paper UK driving licence, Inland Revenue Sub-Contractor's Certificate, Benefits Agency book/letter, Tax Code Notification, EU Residence Permit, Local council rent card, or tenancy agreement.
3.2.3: Notification of seller's solicitor details required only upon request.
4.5b: Submit Certificates of Title via Lender Exchange or post to Halifax Plc, PO Box 548, Leeds, LS1 1WU.
4.1: Valuation reports are provided in non-forwardable electronic formats.
Conveyancers must obtain the copy of the valuation report provided to the customer.
4.3: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com to report incorrect valuation assumptions.
5.1.1: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com if seller owned property < 6 months.
Remortgage applications require minimum 6 months ownership (exception: inherited property).
Sub-sales and back-to-back transactions are prohibited.
Granting of a lease immediately after acquiring freehold/superior leasehold is considered a sub-sale and is prohibited.
Assignable, Fulfilment, Assisted, Assignment, Novation, or Transferable contracts are prohibited.
Irrevocable powers of attorney in favor of intervening sellers are prohibited.
Report any Unilateral Notice registered against the freehold title.
5.2.1: Assignable contracts and irrevocable powers of attorney for intervening sellers are prohibited.
5.4.4: Do not send environmental or contaminated land reports.
5.4.5: Personal searches accepted if the firm is a member of a trade body with established standards and insurance.
Firm must be a member of an industry body abiding by the Property Ombudsman scheme.
5.5.3a: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com if conditions won't be met by completion.
5.5.3b: Planning permission documents: forward to borrower; do not send to lender.
5.5.3c: Building regulation consents: forward to borrower; do not send to lender.
5.5.3d: Certificates of lawful use: forward to borrower; do not send to lender.
5.5.4: First Homes Scheme: report if not mentioned in the mortgage offer.
First Homes Scheme: ensure compliance with price covenants and affordable housing guidance.
Lender consents to First Homes restrictions without separate application if rules are met.
5.7.1a: Flying freeholds accepted if they comprise only part of the title.
5.7.1c: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com regarding flying freeholds or freehold flats.
5.8.1: Buildings with up to 4 flats accepted if borrower occupies one and owns the freehold/share (also accepted for BTL with no occupancy requirement).
Report arrangement if not noted in valuation/inspection report.
5.8.5: Accepted: Mortgage required on the borrower's leasehold interest and their freehold interest in the other flat (subject to the neighbor's lease).
5.9.1: Commonhold tenure is not accepted for new mortgages.
5.13.1: Gifted deposits from immediate family (birth, blood, spouse, child, in-law, or co-habitee) are accepted without reporting if the property is owner-occupied and not to be let.
Gifted deposit letters must include: donor name/address, relationship, borrower details, property address, amount/source, and confirmation that it is non-repayable with no interest acquired.
Letters must be dated within 3 months of completion.
Gifts from friends or employers are prohibited.
Deeds of Trust or Second Charges to protect gifted deposits are prohibited.
BTL transactions: gifts are prohibited if the vendor is a family member.
Clear bankruptcy searches required for all donors; notify lender if not clear.
Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com if balance is not provided per Part 1 instructions.
5.14.15a: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com for absentee or insolvent landlords.
5.14.15b: Indemnity insurance accepted for absent/insolvent landlords.
5.14.17a: Post-completion: Send executed Leaseholder Certificate, confirmation of submission to landlord, and any Landlord Certificate.
5.14.17b: Report before completion if owner is a non-qualifying leaseholder or if remediation monies are payable.
Do not complete without further written instructions after reporting safety/remediation issues.
5.14.17c: Building safety reporting requirements do not apply to remortgages.
5.14.1: Minimum unexpired lease term: 70 years from the date of the mortgage.
5.14.10: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com for service charge matters.
5.14.11: Indemnity insurance accepted for unsatisfactory lease terms.
5.14.12: Ground rent/service charge receipts: forward to borrower; do not send to lender.
5.14.13: Notice of mortgage: Send copy on completion; original to borrower.
5.15.2a: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com for management company problems.
5.15.2b: Management company share certificate: forward to borrower; do not send to lender.
5.15.2c: Do not send blank stock transfer forms.
5.15.2d: Management company Memo/Articles: Send copies on completion; originals to borrower.
5.16.2: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com if search entries cannot be certified as non-relating.
5.17.5a: Do not send Power of Attorney documents.
5.17.5b: Do not send statutory declarations of non-revocation.
5.19.1: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com for affordable housing queries.
Lending limited to Government, social housing, and co-funded social housing schemes.
Private company schemes (developers/builders/employers) are prohibited unless explicitly approved for offers issued after Jan 16, 2023.
5.20.1: Report solar PV panel lease non-compliance via 1.11a contact.
5.20.4: Disclosure of Green Deal Plans is not required.
6.1.3: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com if offer is not taken up.
6.2.1: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com for property description discrepancies.
6.3.1: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com for purchase price issues.
6.4.4: Report cash/financial incentives to ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com if they exceed 5% of purchase price.
Report if cash incentives are > 10% higher than specified in the mortgage offer.
Report if any cash incentives exist and the offer does not mention them.
Report non-financial/in-kind incentives (e.g. cars), but excluding fixed property fittings (kitchens, carpets, etc.).
Finder's fees are not acceptable and must be reported.
Report if the deposit for a non-new-build is paid by the seller.
Do not send CML Disclosure of Incentives form unless specifically requested.
Reporting address: Halifax Plc PO Box 548 Leeds LS1 1WU.
6.4.5: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com if purchase money control is restricted.
6.5.1: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com if vacant possession is not provided.
6.6.1: Distressed sales, sale & leaseback, and AST arrangements where vendor stays in occupation are prohibited.
6.6.3: Tenancy agreements: forward to borrower; do not send to lender.
6.6.4: HMOs accepted with max 5 unrelated occupiers on a single AST.
Mandatory HMO licence must be in place.
6.7.1: Accepted Warranty Schemes: ABC+, Advantage HCI, Aedis/HomeProof, Ark, Build Warranty Group, BLP, Buildzone, Cadis, Checkmate, CIR, Compariqo, FMB/Build Assure, Global Home Warranties, ICW, NHBC, One Guarantee, Premier Guarantee, Protek, Q Assure, Thomas Miller.
6.7.2: Warranty documentation: forward to borrower; do not send to lender.
6.7.3: Building standards assignments: forward to borrower; do not send to lender.
6.7.4: Properties without warranties accepted if site has <= 15 properties and construction was monitored by a professional consultant.
6.7.6: Do not send professional consultant's certificates.
6.8.1: Absence of road/sewer bond/agreement: Reporting not mandatory; no retention will be made.
6.10.2: Retentions or instalments are released to the borrower.
6.12.1: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com for pre-emption rights or resale restrictions.
7.3: Consent required from all occupants 17+ except borrower's children or children of co-habitants.
7.4: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com if sole borrower is married/co-habiting with a resident spouse/partner (consent required).
8.1: Solicitors may advise third parties if no risk of challenge exists.
9.1: Indemnity insurance policies: forward to borrower; do not send to lender.
9.2: Indemnity limit must at least equal the mortgage advance.
10.2a: Advance paid via CHAPS; no fee charged.
10.2b: Minimum 3 full working days notice for funds request.
10.3: Standard deductions limited to retentions specified in the mortgage offer.
10.7: Return delayed funds within 1 working day via electronic transfer.
Use reason codes: RAD (Returned advance) or FADV (Returned further advance).
10.9: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com if completion is delayed.
10.10: Maximum time to hold advance: 1 working day.
10.11: Interest charged at the offer's contractual rate from the date funds were sent.
12.3.1: Email: ConveyancerSupportTeam@lloydsbanking.com for release of retentions.
